---
name: 🚀 Feature Request (Epic)
about: Propose a new feature or large enhancement (epic) for this project
title: "Epic: <short description of the feature>"
labels: epic, enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary

A concise summary of the feature or epic you would like to see implemented.

## 💡 Motivation

Why is this feature important? What user problem does it solve?

- **Problem**: …
- **Impact**: …
- **Affected users / personas**: …

## 📐 Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed solution at a high level. Diagrams, mockups, and links to related discussions are very welcome.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered, and why they were not chosen.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🧩 Sub-tasks

> The Issue Management Automation workflow will automatically generate the four standard epic sub-tasks (Requirements Analysis, Design and Architecture, Implementation, Testing and Documentation) and link them in an `## Epic Tasks` checklist below.

## 🚦 Priority Hint

> Indicate the priority of this epic. Use words like **important**, **high**, **blocking** for high-priority items, **medium**/**normal** for standard requests, and **low**, **minor**, **nice-to-have** for low-priority ideas.

## 🔗 Related Work

- Related issues: #
- Related discussions / RFCs: 
- Dependencies: 

---

_This template is processed by the Issue Management Automation workflow which will create sub-issues, apply labels, and post a "Feature Request Process" comment._
